creator: marianarlt@icloud.com
text: Well. I was excited fast. And the system is booting reliably. But I actually was fast to say that all DomU guests work well. I have very mixed experiences. Debian 12 will get stuck after GRUB, Windows Server 2022 will boot infinitely and Ubuntu 22 LTS starts fine. But I also swapped some xen-kernel files at this point. Do you have instructions on what combination of what xen kernel I need to use at this point? With your specific patch? Should I re-compile xen from ports at this point to be on the safe side?
